notes.note: Alyzia, a small port of Acarnania in western Greece, was the first major stop on Cicero's homeward voyage after leaving Tiro behind at Patrae.

notes.anchor: a hundred and twenty stadia this side of Leucas
notes.note: The stadion is the standard Greek measure of distance (roughly 185 m), so about 22 km; Cicero gives the gap between Alyzia and Leucas to help Tiro gauge the journey if he follows.
